zh.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunsson是Brun Svensson和Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting的兒子，於1460年出生在瑞典斯卡拉波格卡可法拉亞海托普。他於1506年7月13日與Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik在瑞典額斯特格特藍德海托普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1568年在瑞典斯卡拉波格巴耶享年108歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunsson是Brun Svensson和Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting的儿子，于1460年出生在瑞典斯卡拉波格卡可法拉亞海托普。他于1506年7月13日与Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik在瑞典額斯特格特藍德海托普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1568年在瑞典斯卡拉波格巴耶享年108岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brunsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English personal name Brun (Old English Brūna or Old Norse Brúni) + -son ‘Brown's son’. See Brown . There may also be occasional survivals of an Old English compound personal name Brūnsunu ‘brown son’, attested in the Domesday Book, and presumably given to a child with brown hair or complexion. Whether it was also used as an adult nickname is uncertain. This form of the surname is most common in Norfolk.

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brownson
meanings: History: John Brownson or Bronson was one of the original settlers of Hartford, CT, in 1635.

nameMeanings.name: Lindorm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Emilienne, Germaine, Jacques, Lucien, Lucienne, Pierre, Raymonde, Regine, Yvan, Yves.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Lindor, borne by the main character in The Barber of Seville, a play written in 1773 by the French writer Pierre Beaumarchais.

French: habitational name from Lindor, a placename (part of the city of Labouheyre) in Landes. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is very rare in France. It was brought to the US mainly from the West Indies (mostly Haiti).

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.

en.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunsson was born in 1460, in Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Sweden as the son of Brun Svensson and Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. He married Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik on 13 July 1506, in Häggetorp, Östergötland, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1568, in Valle, Skaraborg, Sweden, at the age of 108.

fr.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunsson est né en 1460, à Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Suède, fils de Brun Svensson et Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. Il a épousé Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik le 13 juillet 1506, à Häggetorp, Östergötland, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1568, à Valle, Skaraborg, Suède, à l’âge de 108 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunsson wurde 1460 in Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Schweden, als Sohn von Brun Svensson und Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting geboren. Er hat am 13. Juli 1506 in Häggetorp, Östergötland, Schweden Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1568 im Alter von 108 Jahren in Valle, Skaraborg, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunsson è nato il nel 1460 nel Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Svezia come figlio di Brun Svensson e Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. Lui sposato Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik il 13 luglio 1506, nel Häggetorp, Östergötland, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1568, nel Valle, Skaraborg, Svezia, all'età di 108 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunssonは1460年にスウェーデンスカラボルグクイルケファラhaグジェトルプでBrun SvenssonとGyrit Bengtsdotter Rytingの息子として生まれた。1506年7月13日にスウェーデンoステルグoトランドhaグジェトルプでCarin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvikと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1568年にスウェーデンスカラボルグヴァルで108歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunsson(은)는 1460년 스웨덴 스카라볼그 키르케팰라 ha짓르프에서 Brun Svensson(와)과 Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1506년 7월 13일 스웨덴 o스터그o틀랜드 ha짓르프에서 Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 스웨덴 스카라볼그 발에서 108세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunsson nasceu em 1460, em Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Suécia filho de Brun Svensson e Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. Ele casou-se com Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik em 13 de julho de 1506, em Häggetorp, Östergötland, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1568, em Valle, Skaraborg, Suécia, com 108 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunsson родился в 1460 г. в местности хaгеторп, киркефалла, скараборг, Швеция. Его родителей звали Brun Svensson и Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. Он женился на женщине по имени Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik 13 июля 1506 г. в местности хaгеторп, oстиргoтланд, Швеция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1568 г. в местности валл, скараборг, Швеция в возрасте 108 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lindorm Brunsson nació en 1460, en Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Suecia como hijo de Brun Svensson y Gyrit Bengtsdotter Ryting. Se casó con Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik el 13 de julio de 1506, en Häggetorp, Östergötland, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1568, en Valle, Skaraborg, Suecia, a la edad de 108 años.
